bird.summary: The Sri Lanka thrush or Sri Lanka scaly thrush (Zoothera imbricata) is a member of the thrush family Turdidae. This bird is an endemic resi…

locations.name: 雨林
locations.summary: 雨林是雨量甚多的生物區系。雨林依位置的不同分热带雨林和溫帶雨林。雨林大多数靠近赤道，在赤道经过的非洲、亚洲和南美洲都有大片的雨林。湿润的气候保证了树和植物的快速生产。同时，树和植物也为雨林中的成千上万种生物提供了食物和庇护所。雨林曾經覆蓋…

relations.subject: Sri Lanka thrush
relations.evidence: This bird is an endemic resident breeder found in south western rainforests of the island of Sri Lanka
